Actions.Text: REFERRED TO CIVIL SERVICE AND PENSIONS
REFERRED TO CIVIL SERVICE AND PENSIONS
AMEND (T) AND RECOMMIT TO CIVIL SERVICE AND PENSIONS

Title: Relates to continued health coverage in retirement for certain NYC employees who transferred departments
Summary: Provides for continued health coverage in retirement for certain NYC employees who transferred departments.
ActClause: AN ACT in relation to continued health coverage in retirement for certain employees of the city of New York
